title: trigonochilum miradorense
intro: Trigonochilum miradorense is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Trigonochilum miradorense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections, among others. Herbal preparations of Trigonochilum miradorense can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional folk medicine in the Philippines.
